name: Agente WhatsApp IA - Clinica Sorriso Prime

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ conversation_id: $node['Buscar ou criar conversa'].json[0].id, direction: 'inbound', message_type: $node['Normalizar mensagem'].json.message_type, content: $node['Normalizar mensagem'].json.content }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ generationConfig: { temperature: 0.4, responseMimeType: 'application/json' }, contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ conversation_id: $node['Buscar ou criar conversa'].json[0].id, direction: 'outbound', message_type: 'text', content: $node['Tratar resposta IA'].json.reply, ai_response: $node['Tratar resposta IA'].json.reply }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $node['Normalizar mensagem'].json.phone, text: $node['Tratar resposta IA'].json.reply }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ conversation_id: $node['Buscar ou criar conversa'].json[0].id, event_type: $json.error ? 'whatsapp_send_error' : 'message_processed', payload: { whatsapp_result: $json, ai: $node['Tratar resposta IA'].json, inbound: $node['Normalizar mensagem'].json } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, conversation_id: $node['Buscar ou criar conversa'].json[0].id, reply: $node['Tratar resposta IA'].json.reply } }}
